context: Tests whether the agent applies progressive disclosure correctly when the domain is genuinely large: common-path content stays inline in SKILL.md, edge-case material is pushed behind a context pointer into a sibling file. The invoice domain has a universal workflow (every invoice) plus large edge-case material (vendor quirks, multi-currency, escalation thresholds) that most runs won't reach.

checklist.name: SKILL.md stays legible
checklist.description: SKILL.md covers the common path without being bloated by edge-case detail. It reads as a focused entry point, not an exhaustive encyclopedia.

checklist.name: Edge-case material in sibling file
checklist.description: Vendor-specific quirks, exception handling, multi-currency rules, escalation thresholds, or other rarely-needed material is in a sibling file (e.g. REFERENCE.md or EXCEPTIONS.md), not embedded inline in SKILL.md.

checklist.name: Context pointer wording is reliable
checklist.description: SKILL.md references the sibling file with wording that fires reliably when the situation calls for it — e.g. 'If handling a disputed invoice, see EXCEPTIONS.md' — not just a generic 'See REFERENCE.md' buried at the bottom that the agent may skip.

checklist.name: Common path genuinely inline
checklist.description: The standard workflow (receipt → validation → approval → posting) is present in SKILL.md, not hidden in the reference file. The reference file holds edge cases, not the primary path.

checklist.name: Sibling file exists and is substantive
checklist.description: The external reference file exists and contains actual domain content — not a stub, placeholder, or single-line file.

checklist.name: Invocation type declared
checklist.description: The skill explicitly declares its invocation type (disable-model-invocation: true OR model-facing description with trigger phrasing). Not left as an accidental default.

checklist.name: No no-ops present
checklist.description: No line tells the model to do what it already does by default ('be thorough', 'check carefully', 'ensure accuracy').

checklist.name: Steps have completion criteria
checklist.description: Steps end on a checkable condition, not just a vague action ('submit for approval: approval email or ticket status confirms received').

checklist.name: Design notes explain disclosure decisions
checklist.description: design-notes.md explains what content was kept inline vs pushed to the reference file, and why.
